◎简　　介  

　　又使我们成为国民，作他父神的祭司。但愿荣耀、权能归给他，直到永永远远。阿们！（启示录1：6）And made us a kingdom , priests to his God and Father , to him be glory and dominion for ever and ever . Amen . ( Revelation 1:6 )
